name: Ask User Types
description: Create src/ask-user/types.ts with AskUserRequest interface (callId, question, context?, inputType, choices?, placeholder?) and AskUserAnswer discriminated union (5 variants: text, number, boolean, choice, cancelled). See PRP-042 Feature F-104 for exact type definitions.
tests: File src/ask-user/types.ts exists

AskUserRequest interface has fields: callId (string), question (string), context? (string), inputType ('text'|'number'|'boolean'|'choice'), choices? ({id:string,label:string}[]), placeholder? (string)
AskUserAnswer is discriminated union by 'type' with 5 variants: text, number, boolean, choice, cancelled
npx tsc --noEmit passes

name: Ask User Schema
description: Create src/ask-user/schema.ts with Zod schema askUserSchema (z.object with question, context?, inputType with default 'text', choices?, placeholder?) and inferred type AskUserInput. Each field must have .describe() for model consumption. See PRP-042 Feature F-105.
tests: File src/ask-user/schema.ts exists
askUserSchema is a z.object with fields: question (required string), context (optional string), inputType (enum with default 'text'), choices (optional array), placeholder (optional string)
All schema fields have .describe() calls
AskUserInput type is exported as z.infer<typeof askUserSchema>
npx tsc --noEmit passes

name: Ask User Prompt
description: Create src/ask-user/prompt.ts with exported constant ASK_USER_SYSTEM_PROMPT containing English-language instructions for the model on when and how to use the ask_user tool. See PRP-042 Feature F-106 for exact content.
tests: File src/ask-user/prompt.ts exists
ASK_USER_SYSTEM_PROMPT is exported as a string constant
Prompt text mentions ask_user tool, clarification, missing info, confirmation
Prompt mentions inputType='choice' for discrete options

name: Options askUser Flags
description: Add askUser?: boolean and askUserTimeoutMs?: number to the Options interface in src/types/options.ts, after the richOutput field. Zero overhead when false/absent. See PRP-044 Feature F-110.
tests: Options interface in src/types/options.ts has askUser?: boolean field
Options interface has askUserTimeoutMs?: number field
Fields are placed after richOutput in the interface
npx tsc --noEmit passes

name: Ask User MCP Server
description: Create src/ask-user/server.ts with createAskUserMcpServer() that registers ask_user tool as MCP server. Handler blocks via Promise until client responds. Concurrent guard rejects with isError:true if question already pending. Timeout via optional timeoutMs resolves with cancelled. Uses tool() and createSdkMcpServer() from ../mcp.js. See PRP-043 Feature F-108.
tests: File src/ask-user/server.ts exists
createAskUserMcpServer() exported as async function accepting {onAskUser, pendingMap, timeoutMs?}
Handler uses randomUUID() from node:crypto for callId generation
Concurrent guard: if pendingMap.size > 0, returns CallToolResult with isError:true
Handler blocks via new Promise and stores resolve in pendingMap
Timeout cleans up pendingMap entry and resolves with { type: 'cancelled' }
AskUserEmitter type is exported
Uses tool() and createSdkMcpServer() from ../mcp.js

name: formatAnswer
description: Implement and export formatAnswer(answer, timeoutMs?) in src/ask-user/server.ts. Converts AskUserAnswer to human-readable text for the model. Covers all 5 variants: text→'User answered: <value>', number→'User answered: <value>', boolean→'User answered: yes/no', choice→'User chose: <id>', cancelled→timeout message or 'User cancelled the question.' See PRP-043 Feature F-109.
tests: formatAnswer is exported from src/ask-user/server.ts
formatAnswer({ type: 'text', value: 'hello' }) returns 'User answered: hello'
formatAnswer({ type: 'number', value: 42 }) returns 'User answered: 42'
formatAnswer({ type: 'boolean', value: true }) returns 'User answered: yes'
formatAnswer({ type: 'boolean', value: false }) returns 'User answered: no'
formatAnswer({ type: 'choice', id: 'opt-1' }) returns 'User chose: opt-1'
formatAnswer({ type: 'cancelled' }, 30000) returns 'User did not respond within 30s.'
formatAnswer({ type: 'cancelled' }) returns 'User cancelled the question.'

name: Ask User Barrel
description: Create src/ask-user/index.ts as barrel module re-exporting: AskUserRequest/AskUserAnswer (type) from ./types.js, askUserSchema/AskUserInput from ./schema.js, createAskUserMcpServer/formatAnswer/AskUserEmitter from ./server.js, ASK_USER_SYSTEM_PROMPT from ./prompt.js. All paths with .js extension. See PRP-042 Feature F-107.
tests: File src/ask-user/index.ts exists
Re-exports AskUserRequest and AskUserAnswer as types from ./types.js
Re-exports askUserSchema and AskUserInput from ./schema.js
Re-exports createAskUserMcpServer, formatAnswer, AskUserEmitter from ./server.js
Re-exports ASK_USER_SYSTEM_PROMPT from ./prompt.js
All import paths use .js extension
npx tsc --noEmit passes

name: Query askUser Methods
description: Add onAskUser(handler) and respondToAskUser(callId, answer) to Query interface and implementation in src/query.ts. Import AskUserRequest/AskUserAnswer from ./ask-user/types.js directly. Internal state: askUserHandler callback variable + pendingAskUserMap (Map). Last handler wins for onAskUser. respondToAskUser with unknown callId does console.warn + no-op (no throw). See PRP-044 Feature F-111.
tests: Query interface declares onAskUser(handler: (request: AskUserRequest) => void): void
Query interface declares respondToAskUser(callId: string, answer: AskUserAnswer): void
Internal state variables: askUserHandler and pendingAskUserMap exist in query() scope
q.onAskUser sets askUserHandler (last handler wins, no multi-subscriber)
q.respondToAskUser with valid callId calls resolve, deletes entry from map
q.respondToAskUser with unknown callId logs console.warn and returns without throwing
npx tsc --noEmit passes

name: Lifecycle askUser Hook
description: In src/query.ts lifecycleGenerator(), after the richOutput block, add askUser integration: when options.askUser is true, dynamic import ./ask-user/index.js, create server via createAskUserMcpServer with pendingAskUserMap, inject as mcpServers['ask_user'], merge ASK_USER_SYSTEM_PROMPT via mergeSystemPromptAppend (imported from ./display/prompt.js). Warn if existing ask_user key. Warn if no onAskUser handler when agent invokes tool. Orthogonal to richOutput. See PRP-044 Feature F-112.
tests: lifecycleGenerator() has askUser block after richOutput block
Block uses dynamic import('./ask-user/index.js') for zero overhead when disabled
createAskUserMcpServer called with {onAskUser callback, pendingMap: pendingAskUserMap, timeoutMs: optionsForCli.askUserTimeoutMs}
Server injected as mcpServers['ask_user'] in optionsForCli
ASK_USER_SYSTEM_PROMPT merged via mergeSystemPromptAppend from ./display/prompt.js
console.warn if existing 'ask_user' key in mcpServers (override warning)
console.warn if askUserHandler not registered when onAskUser callback fires
Both askUser and richOutput can be true simultaneously (orthogonal)
npx tsc --noEmit passes

name: Public Exports
description: Add 'export type { AskUserRequest, AskUserAnswer } from "./ask-user/index.js"' to src/index.ts after the display exports block. Only types — do NOT export askUserSchema, createAskUserMcpServer, formatAnswer, or ASK_USER_SYSTEM_PROMPT. See PRP-045 Feature F-113.
tests: src/index.ts contains: export type { AskUserRequest, AskUserAnswer } from './ask-user/index.js'
Export line is placed after the display exports block
Only AskUserRequest and AskUserAnswer are exported (no internal symbols)
Uses 'export type' (not 'export') for tree-shaking
npx tsc --noEmit passes

name: README Ask User Section
description: Add 'Ask User' section to README.md after the 'Rich Output' section. Include: description, end-to-end TypeScript example with query({askUser:true})+onAskUser+respondToAskUser, Options table (askUser boolean, askUserTimeoutMs number), inputTypes table (text/number/boolean/choice with answer types), cancellation example, note that askUser and richOutput are orthogonal. See PRP-045 Feature F-114.
tests: README.md contains '### Ask User' section header
Section is placed after 'Rich Output' section
Contains TypeScript code example with query() using askUser:true, onAskUser handler, respondToAskUser call
Contains Options table with askUser and askUserTimeoutMs rows
Contains inputTypes table with text, number, boolean, choice rows and answer types
Shows cancellation example with { type: 'cancelled' }
Mentions orthogonality with richOutput
